testcase.name: test_hybrid_hdf5_mode

failure.message: FileNotFoundError: Base file ./test_data/mosaik_demo.hdf5 does not exist

testcase.failure: tests\hdf5_sim_tests.py:73: in test_hybrid_hdf5_mode self.run_simulation_test("hybrid_hdf5", setup_simulation) tests\framework\base_test.py:102: in run_simulation_test _ = self.test_builder.build_hdf5_file() if self.test_builder.hdf5_builder else "test_simulation.hdf5" ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^ tests\framework\test_builder.py:60: in build_hdf5_file return self.hdf5_builder.build() ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^ sally\core\hdf5_builder.py:228: in build path = self._create_hybrid_hdf5() ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^ sally\core\hdf5_builder.py:274: in _create_hybrid_hdf5 raise FileNotFoundError(f"Base file {self.path} does not exist") E FileNotFoundError: Base file ./test_data/mosaik_demo.hdf5 does not exist

testcase.name: test_manual_hdf5_mode
testcase.failure: tests\hdf5_sim_tests.py:53: in test_manual_hdf5_mode self.run_simulation_test("manual_hdf5", setup_simulation) tests\framework\base_test.py:113: in run_simulation_test from sally.simulation.sg_hdf5_sim import SmartGridSimulation E ModuleNotFoundError: No module named 'sally.simulation'

testcase.name: test_mosaik_style_entities
testcase.failure: tests\hdf5_sim_tests.py:97: in test_mosaik_style_entities self.run_simulation_test("mosaik_style", setup_simulation) tests\framework\base_test.py:113: in run_simulation_test from sally.simulation.sg_hdf5_sim import SmartGridSimulation E ModuleNotFoundError: No module named 'sally.simulation'

testcase.name: test_real_hdf5_mode

failure.message: FileNotFoundError: Real HDF5 file ./test_data/mosaik_demo.hdf5 does not exist

testcase.failure: tests\hdf5_sim_tests.py:24: in test_real_hdf5_mode self.run_simulation_test("real_hdf5", setup_simulation) tests\framework\base_test.py:102: in run_simulation_test _ = self.test_builder.build_hdf5_file() if self.test_builder.hdf5_builder else "test_simulation.hdf5" ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^ tests\framework\test_builder.py:60: in build_hdf5_file return self.hdf5_builder.build() ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^ sally\core\hdf5_builder.py:217: in build raise FileNotFoundError(f"Real HDF5 file {self.path} does not exist") E FileNotFoundError: Real HDF5 file ./test_data/mosaik_demo.hdf5 does not exist
